scope_summary.problem: Two separate frontends (vanilla JS viewer in SDD + React app in Conductor) render the same domain. Wasted effort maintaining two codebases.
scope_summary.success_criteria: Single React app under crates/sdd/packages/@score/ that both Score (via axum embedded) and Conductor (via import) consume. score view opens the React app. Conductor FE imports @score/app as sub-routes.

out_of_scope: New UI features beyond existing viewer capabilities
Backend API changes beyond SddDataSource endpoints
constraints: Pre-built assets committed (no Node.js at cargo build time)
